titleStmt.title: SII 18.88: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 88. (B.K. No. 42 of 1933-34.) GAḶAGANĀTH, HAVERI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab set up in the temple of the Gaḷagēs11vara.

summary.p: This inscription, referring itself to the reign of Tribhuvanamalla Vikramachakri, is dated in the Chālukya-Vikrama year 5 (in words) Raudra. Jyēshṭha Amāvāsyā, Sunday, Saṁkrānti, Solar eclipse. But for the week-day the details correspond to A.D. 1080, June 20. The week-day was, however, Saturday. There was a solar eclipse on that day, but the Saṁkrānti (Karkāṭaka) occurred on the following Thursday, the 25th.

The record, after describing the valour of Yuvarāja Jayasiṁha, the younger brother of Vikramāditya, states that his subordinate Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Chenna, who was governing Beḷuhuge Seventy, Mūvattāruṁabāḍa (the sub-division of Thirty-six villages), Koṇḍavaṭi, Māhaḷige-nāḍu and other divisions and whose territory extended up to Haive, revived (punar-datti) the grant of the village Pulluṇi situated in Beḷuhuge Seventy to god Gaḷagēśvara of that place for worship and offerings to the god and for the feeding of ascetics, visitors and students as well as for the service of music and dancing in the temple.

Two chiefs named Dāsanṛipāḷa and Sōvidēva are mentioned while giving an account of the conquests of Chenna. Goggi of Haive and Malapa Nāgavarma are stated to have been vanquished by him. In the Silāhara and Kadamba families we find Goggi and Nāgavarma, respectively, but they flourished much earlier than Chenna.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
suranadiya sasiya jaladhiya dharaṇiya bhāskarana puṭṭidaṁdina tīrttaṁ sirisaiḷada kaiḷāsada doreyene pulluṇiya janmamaṟivavaroḷarē .
namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicandracāmaracāravē . traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhamūḷastaṁbhāya saṁbha vē . gaṇapatyā
svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīprithvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēsvara paramabhaṭṭā rakaṁ satyā
śrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmatribhuvanamallavikramacakri stiraṁ jīyāt . virtta . svasti samastabhūbhuvana
bhuṁbhukanāhavamallanēkabhōgyastirasāśanaṁ dharaṇiyaṁ pratipāḷisidiṁ baḷikke bhūmistutanā nṛpātmajanatarkkya
baḷaṁ raṇaraṁgamēru vāṇīstanatārahāranadaṭāgraṇi vikramabhūmipāḷaka . yuvarāja padaviyo
ḷ pallavanṛpanaṁ nirisi vīrasiṁhāsanarājyavivarddhanavikramanudbhavisi da ripudanujakuḷati vikramanāThe letter si is written below the line.
da . dhare gōdhūmeyaṁ naṭṭa kallareva mēṁgal tanna gandēbhamāṁtarirāyargguḍisirdda gōdumeyavaṁ nurggappi
naṁ tēdu bhīkarakīlālajalaughadiṁ miḍidu nānābhakṣamaṁ tīrcci saṁgaradoḷ vikramacakri bhōjanama
nārppindaṁ javaṁgikkida . baḍagaṇa mūḍaṇa teṁkaṇa paḍuvaṇa vārddhigaḷe mēreyene tējaṁ nūrmmaḍise ripu
rāyaraṁ kirttaḍigoṇḍaṁ sakaḷavasumatīmaṇḍaḷama . v® . Ā n®paratnavā n®pamanōbhava nā n®pavandib®nda
kānīnasamānanā nripamanōharavā nripadānamēghanā sūnritavākyanittananujaṁ jaya siṁha
nripaṁge bhūmibhārānṛgaṇaṁ babāppene samasta dharātaḷabhōgabhāgama . samastabhuvana saṁsthūyamāThe lettersta is written above the line.
nalōkavikhyātapallavānvayaṁ śrīmahīvallabha yuvarāja rājaparamēśvaraṁ vīramahē svaraṁ vikra
mābharaṇaṁ jayalakṣmīramaṇaṁ saraṇāgatarakṣāmaṇi cāḷukyacūḍāmaṇi kadanatriṇē
traṁ kṣatriyapavitraṁ mattagajāṁgarājaṁ sahajamanōjaṁ ripurāyakaṭakasūṟekāṟa(ṁ)naṇna
naṁkakāṟaṁ śrīmatraiḷōkyamallavīranoḷaṁbapallavapermmānaḍijayasiṁghadēvar . [©] karavā
ḷaṁ kīḷe kemmanunte jayasiṁhaṁ līḷeyindī purandaranī pāvakanī dinēsasutanī daityē ndranī vāridhī
svaranīmārutanī kapardisakhanī gaurīsaruḷḷaṁjadarppariyiṭṭāvananikkalāṭipanenuttādaṁ bhayabhrā
ntiyiṁ . ka . besasiṁ vikramabhūpati besasa daṁḍanaṟiyenāhavāṁgaṇadeḍeyoḷ besasidoḍe cōḷa
lāḷaranepakamaneṟapanē jitāri vīranoḷaṁba . cōḷanumaṁ lāḷanumaṁ kāḷaga doḷ muṟidu sakaḷabhū
maṇḍaḷamaṁ cāḷukyavikramāvanipāḷaṁgōḷisida ballidaṁ jayasiṁgaṁ . baḍagal perddoṟe mūḍal paḍu
val teṁkal samudraparyyaṁtamenal paḍedaṁ vikramabhūpati kuḍe vīranoḷaṁbadēvanu rvvītaḷama .
va . yuvarājapadaviyoḷ sukhasaṁkatāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁ geyyuttamire tatpāda padmōpa
jīvi samadhigatapañcamahāsabda mahāmaṇḍaḷēsvaraṁ pa mahēsvaraṁ dēvadvi jagurupā
dhārakaṁ paramaṇḍaḷasādhakanubhayabaḷācāryya mandaramahīdharadhairyya dānavinōda (ṁ)nīśvaralabdhaReadpādārādakam.
varaprasādaṁ hayārōhaṇavidhānarēvanta vairisāmantasantānakritāntanaṇtana kēsari subha
ṭasiraḥkarttari pisuṇara gaṇḍaṁ maṇḍaḷikamārttaṇḍaṁ svāmikāryyasamuddharaṇaṁ kaligaḷā bharaṇaṁ
dharmmadharmmātmaja patihitapavanātmaja sasivisadayasōdbhāsi maṇḍaḷikabāṇarāsi cō
ḷakaṭakamaṇḍaḷikakaṁjavanakuṁjara saraṇāgatavajrapaṁjara pusivano siṁgadēvana garu
ḍaṁ śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaḷēsvara cennarasa ma pāḷana mavana bi
ruda bisupuṁ patihita yenisida vijayavikrama na kali
śrījayasiṁghadēvapādaśrī nītiyiṁ dāsanṛpāḷanana rārisaṁhā
ri vīranoḷaṁbaṁ dānaṁ kṛtapuṇyanārggamadhi
kaṁ cennaṁ dharācakradoḷ . rsamaṁteṁba nuḍige saṁgrāmadoḷ candrabaḷa
tārābaḷaṁ bhūbaḷamaniḷabaḷaṁ cātura baḷaṁ vikrāṁtabāhubaḷanatuḷa baḷavai
risāmantakāntaṁ kaba haraṁ namma cenna . ka . diṭadiṭake dhu
rake varpparibhaṭakōṭige rddu taravā nagnamagnabesadoḷadhi dikkidare na
ranātha pēḷve . . ghaṭāḷiyali turagāvaḷiyaṁ samantu kontadoḷella ta nindaṇi
ya bilviḍiyalēṁ padaḻda kappaṁ tōrppallige biṭṭanalligeṁdeydi nalli maraḻci pō nalliye
bittidaṁ peṇaneṁbinavāṁtiṟidaṁ cōḷa . kaṁ . kaṭakakke surigegirppudu gaḍiyisa
denutirppā janada mātēṁ masuḷal diṭavāge sōmidēvana kaṭakaṁ paḍaliḍal gēṇa liṟidaṁ
cenna . vi . surivaruṇāṁbu sūsida miduḷ paridokkaruḷ kaḷalda palmorevasivāḷi nō
ḍuva malejana māḍuva bhūtakōṭi bhīkara viṣa māṁsavaṁ saviva sākiniyarkka ḷanetta
luṁ bhayaṁkarataramādudāntiṟidu geldeḍe dāsamanaṁkakāṟana . tavisal tāṁ sale ta
ṟuṁbal nilalaṟiyalavuṁkal gelal bāradeṁbāhavadārppaṁ sōvidēvaprabaḷahaya
ḷaṁ ḷugginoḷ tōrppudu pallavanuṁ permmāḍiyuṁ bhāppene nija hayamaṁ biṭṭanā pāydanā
tūḷdavanā beṁkoṇḍanā geldane yene geldaṁ cennanāṭandu munna . besanaṁcāḷukada siṁhakṣitipa
ti besasal bandapaṁ cannugaṁ rakkasarūpaṁ tōṟalendaṭṭidanatibhayadiṁdāḷparaṁ kappa
maṁ goggi saḍilduḷḷarttamaṁ koṭṭaḍigeṟagidanā paiveyoḷ nāgavarmmaṁ posa kappaṁde ttaninnu
ḷḷuḷida malaparuḷḷaṁji tannendudeṁbar misukāḍal barkkuve pēḷsanigamasanigaṁ cannugaṁ
gaṁ javaṁgaṁ . Inajana guttana danujana munipana khacarana dānaguṇavorvvuḷiyāytenisi
budhajanake bēḍuva janakīvaṁ karedu piridu phonnaṁ cenna . bhūdānaṁmasvadāna gōdāna su
varṇnadāna(ṁ)meṁbivanittāhlādadinanavarataṁ kanyādānamanīvanēṁ kritārtthanō cenna . vi . ha
rana vi(ni)kētanakke maranaṁ kaḍedalliye keygaḷādavīsvarasadmakke kalgaḍidoḍalliye pūgoḷanā davindusē
karagrihabhittigiṭṭagegaṁ maṇnagaḻdalli taṭākamāduvēṁ piriyanō dharmmavirmmaḍige vandudu cannuga
bhūmipāḷana . Eḍeyoḷu sanda bhūparppalaravaguṇigaḷ nāḍanāḷdāḻda dharmmakkeḍeyāda rddēva
bhōgaṁgaḷanaḷidaḷipā pātakarppōdaḍīgaḷ paḍedaṁ nāḍāḷkeyaṁ pallavanripati manō raṁjana cenna
bhūpaṁ mriḍabhaktaṁ dharmmadharmmātmajanene munisandōhamānandadinda . va . Ene negaḻda mahāma
ṇḍaḷēsvaraṁ cannarasar beḷuhugeyerppattu mūvattāṟuṁbāḍaveraḍuṁ pannirppaḷḷi koṁḍavaṭiyeraḍu
māhaḷigenāḍu modalāge hayveparyyaṁtaṁbaraṁ paḍedu duṣṭanigraha siṣṭapratipāḷanadi
rājadhāni banavaseya kōṭeyoḷu sukasaṁkathāvinōdadinarasugeyyuttamirddu śrīmaccāḷukyavi
kramakāḷadaydeneya raudrasaṁvatsarada jēṣṭadama(ṁ)vāsye Ādityavāra saṁkrānti sūryyagrahaṇa nimi
tyadiṁ tammāḷkeya beḷuhugeyerppattaṟoḷagaṇa sarvvanamasyada pulluṇiyanalliya gaḷagēsvaradēvargge pu
narddattimāḍi dēvaraṁgabhōga snāna nivēdya jīrṇnōddhāra khaṇḍaspuṭita gītavādya nrityavathitiyabhyāgatataphō
dhanargga vidyārtthigaḷgamāhāradānaṁ modalāginitarkkamendu dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi sarvvabādhapari
hāravāgi dēvargge biṭṭarī dharmmamanāvanōrvvaṁ tannāḷva kāladoḷ kādu naḍeyisi dātaṁge bāṇarāsi
kurukṣētra prayāge Argghyatīrtthaṁgaḷoḷ bhūdāna gōdāna vastradānavāhāradāna kanyādānaṁgaḷaṁ koṭṭa pha
ḷavakkuvidanaḷidātaṁgī pēḻda tīrtthasthānaṁgaḷoḷekkōṭi tapōdhanarumaṁ sāsirvvaru brāhmaṇarumaṁ sā
sira kavileyumanaḷida pañcamahāpātakanakku . priyadiṁdintidaneyde kāva purusaṁgā yuṁ
mahāśrīyumakke yidaṁ kāyade kāyvapāpige kurukṣētraṁgaḷoḷ bāraṇāsiyo
ḷekkōṭimunīndraraṁ kavileyaṁ vēdāḍhyaraṁ kondudondayasaṁ sārggumidendu sāṟi dapu
vī saiḷākṣarabrājigaḷ . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasundharā saṣṭirvvarisa saha
srāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimi . sāmānyōyaṁ dharmmasētu nripāṇāṁ kāḷē kā
ḷē pāḷanīyō bhavadbhiḥ sarvvānētāṁ bhāginappā(ṁ)rtthivēndrō bhūyō bhūyō yā
catē rāmabhadraḥ . baladēvana besa maṁggaḷa .
Digital edition of SII 18.88 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
